fixes_applied: tests/test.sh: rewrote v043 python tail to fix P2P_REGRESSION zero-bug — replaced 'for gid in P2P_GATING + P2P_REGRESSION: hard_zero=True' with separate p2p_failed loop over P2P_GATING only (so legit P2P_GATING id 'p2p_file_present' still hard-zeros on file corruption, but P2P_REGRESSION ids p2p_upstream_7a8254b6 and p2p_upstream_d59414f2 are informational only). Added existing<=0 guard. Switched to weighted-replace formula. Note: 8084's P2P_GATING (p2p_file_present) is a real gate (file existence + balanced braces in routing.rs) and was preserved — only P2P_REGRESSION ids were demoted to informational.
notes: Pre-flagged GOOD (small focused +17/-59 patch with 4 F2P). Confirmed: 4 F2P gates summing to 1.0 cover #[cfg(not(feature='release'))] elimination, #[cfg(feature='release')] elimination, no bare JWT-only handler-auth (regex on src), and api-key path preserved across all handlers (counts auth::auth_type vs api_locking::LockAction). Behavioral and gaming-resistant. Upstream PR 8083 is a single-file refactor in crates/router/src/routes/routing.rs — 4 gates fully cover the cfg gating removal.
